subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh in remembrance of God! In the Quran, the Divine Book, the suppression of anger is mentioned as among the distinctive qualities of the people of unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بذکر الهی در قرآن کتاب الهی از خصائص اهل توحید کظم غیظ بیان فرموده
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
